headline: How The AI Debate Is Recasting The Booking Holdings (BKNG) Investment Story
summary: Booking Holdings’ fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly, from US$5,816.77 to US$5,802.23 per share, a reduction of about 0.3%. That small move reflects a market debate in which some analysts highlight solid Q4 execution and AI resilience, while others focus on how agentic tools and new shopping models could influence long term profitability and valuation. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how you can track the key inputs behind it. Stay updated as the Fair...

headline: Shares of travel-related companies are trading higher amid a drop in oil prices after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. postponed strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days, which may ease inflation concerns. ICE agents deployed to airports to ease TSA shortages amid a partial government shutdown may alleviate travel complications.

headline: Agoda Curates Top Weekend Trip Destinations in Asia
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda unveils a selection of weekend trip destinations across Asia, perfect for travelers seeking a quick escape. In today's fast-paced world, weekend trips have become increasingly appealing as they offer a refreshing break from the daily grind without requiring extensive time off work. These short getaways provide an opportunity to explore new cultures, indulge in local cuisines, and experience diverse landscapes, all within a few days.

headline: Agoda Reveals 55% Increase in Hari Raya Accommodation Searches with Japan and China Among Top Searched Markets
summary: As Hari Raya approaches, digital travel platform Agoda marks a 55% month-on-month increase in accommodation searches from travelers in Malaysia, Indonesia and Singapore for check-ins during the festive period of 20 to 23 March 2026. Bali remains the most searched destination amongst travelers from these origins with Yogyakarta, Bandung, Kuala Lumpur and Tokyo following closely.
